_publications._publicationTitle: Longitudinal phenotype development in a minipig model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: One out of eight NF1+/ex42del animals developed a neurofibroma which progressed over time, paralleled to imaging characteristics of human neurofibromas, and demonstrated differential maturation on histopathology.
details: One out of eight NF1+/ex42del animals developed a neurofibroma which progressed over time and demonstrated differential maturation on histopathology
